entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop affected by dry root rot

entities.name: DRY ROOT ROT
entities.description: A disease caused by Rhizoctonia bataticola that threatens chickpea production

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA BATATICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing dry root rot

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A climatic factor that, when high, increases the aggressiveness of dry root rot

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: A soil factor that, when low, increases the aggressiveness of dry root rot

entities.name: DISEASE SEVERITY
entities.description: The extent of the disease impact on the plant

entities.name: PERCENT SUSCEPTIBILITY INDEX
entities.description: A metric used to quantify disease severity derived from a rating scale

entities.name: MODIFIED 0-9 RATING SCALE
entities.description: A scale used to assess disease symptoms to calculate the susceptibility index

entities.name: PERCENT LOSS IN ROOT BIOMASS
entities.description: A measure of the reduction in root mass due to disease infection

entities.name: REAL-TIME QPCR
entities.description: A molecular technique used for the absolute quantification of fungal propagules

entities.name: FUNGAL PROPAGULES
entities.description: The reproductive units of the fungus present in root tissues

relationships.description: acts as combined stress to cause infection
acts as combined stress to cause infection
